clues: A remote user can connect to the VPN but cannot access any internal company resources.
The VPN client shows 'Connected' status with a valid IP address assigned.
The user's internet connection is working perfectly throughout the VPN session.
Disconnecting and reconnecting the VPN several times eventually works for a few hours.
Running 'route print' shows the VPN routes pointing to an incorrect gateway address.
